'''Aburaage''' is a delicious food item that gives you 5 hunger points.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Aburaage.png
| id = aburaage
| type = Food
| Subtype = Soy
| Properties = Hunger points: 5/10
| stackable = 64
| Description = Also known as Fried Tofu. Can be used to make Inarizushi.
}}

Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!

==Obtaining==
===Smelting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!(Smelting, Campfire, Smoker) Recipe
|-
|[[Tofu]]
|[[File:Aburaage smelting.png|336x336px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Used In==
*Inarizushi (WIP)
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
